bugs.title: Empty button without accessibility label
bugs.message: An interactive button has no visible text and lacks an aria-label.
bugs.solution: Add missing accessibility attributes (e.g. alt="..." for img tags, labels for inputs, or aria-labels for buttons) to support screen readers and pass WCAG 2.1 compliance.

bugs.title: Multiple H1 Headings
bugs.message: Multiple H1 tags are present. Only one primary H1 should exist per page for proper SEO ranking.
bugs.solution: Optimize metadata, titles, and header hierarchies. Ensure page description is between 120-160 characters and has a single primary h1 header.

bugs.title: Console warning: The resource https://react.dev/images/home/conf2019/cover.sv...
bugs.message: The resource https://react.dev/images/home/conf2019/cover.svg was preloaded using link preload but not used within a few seconds from the window's load event. Please make sure it has an appropriate `as` value and it is preloaded intentionally.
bugs.details: Console logged stack indicators pointing to source locations: https://react.dev/:0:0
bugs.solution:
1. Trace JavaScript stack references at: https://react.dev/:0:0.
2. Ensure all external variables are loaded before accessing them.
3. Add defensive null checks around target elements.

bugs.title: Missing security header: Content-Security-Policy (CSP)
bugs.message: The server response does not contain the "Content-Security-Policy (CSP)" header. Mitigates XSS and clickjacking attacks.
bugs.details: Exposed configuration token, credentials, or security configuration warning found.
bugs.solution: Rotate keys immediately. Add .env to .gitignore. Utilize environments managers or secure configuration storage vaults.

bugs.title: Missing security header: X-Frame-Options
bugs.message: The server response does not contain the "X-Frame-Options" header. Protects website users against clickjacking.
bugs.details: Exposed configuration token, credentials, or security configuration warning found.
bugs.solution: Rotate keys immediately. Add .env to .gitignore. Utilize environments managers or secure configuration storage vaults.

bugs.title: Missing security header: X-Content-Type-Options
bugs.message: The server response does not contain the "X-Content-Type-Options" header. Prevents browser mime-type sniffing.
bugs.details: Exposed configuration token, credentials, or security configuration warning found.
bugs.solution: Rotate keys immediately. Add .env to .gitignore. Utilize environments managers or secure configuration storage vaults.

bugs.title: Missing security header: Referrer-Policy
bugs.message: The server response does not contain the "Referrer-Policy" header. Controls referrer data sent in request headers.
bugs.details: Exposed configuration token, credentials, or security configuration warning found.
bugs.solution: Rotate keys immediately. Add .env to .gitignore. Utilize environments managers or secure configuration storage vaults.

bugs.title: CSS zoom property compatibility warning
bugs.message: Found use of the non-standard "zoom" property which is deprecated in modern Firefox engines.
bugs.details: Detailed audit report flag indicating standard code quality or optimization checklist item.
bugs.solution: Review configuration settings and trace stack files.

bugs.title: Empty alt tag without decorative role
bugs.message: If the image is purely decorative, add role="presentation" or role="none".
bugs.details: Accessibility checkpoint mismatch. Element fails WCAG 2.1 compliance specifications.
bugs.solution: Add correct labels, tags, and ARIA attributes matching WCAG standards to ensure screen-reader clarity and element focus.
